title: Downtown Luxury Condo
description: Modern luxury condo featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances, hardwood floors throughout, and building amenities including fitness center, rooftop terrace, and 24/7 concierge service.

title: Suburban Family Home
description: Spacious family home in sought-after school district. Open floor plan with updated kitchen, master suite with walk-in closet, finished basement, and large backyard with deck. Two-car garage and close to parks.

title: Investment Duplex
description: Excellent investment opportunity! Well-maintained duplex with separate utilities, off-street parking, and long-term tenants in place. Each unit features updated kitchens and bathrooms. Strong rental history with positive cash flow.

title: Beachfront Villa
description: Stunning beachfront property with panoramic ocean views. Features include infinity pool, outdoor kitchen, home theater, smart home automation, and private beach access. Perfect for luxury living or vacation rental.
